name: everyrow-mcp
description: Give your AI a research team. Forecast, score, classify, or research every row of a dataset.
long_description: MCP server for everyrow: give your AI a research team. Each operation dispatches web research agents across a dataset to forecast, score, classify, deduplicate, merge, or research at scale.

tools.name: everyrow_screen
tools.description: Filter rows — researches each row to evaluate pass/fail.

tools.name: everyrow_rank
tools.description: Score and rank rows — researches each row to compute the score.

tools.name: everyrow_dedupe
tools.description: Deduplicate — researches rows to resolve entity matches.

tools.name: everyrow_merge
tools.description: Join two CSVs — researches to match rows across tables.

tools.name: everyrow_agent
tools.description: Research every row and add new columns.

tools.name: everyrow_forecast
tools.description: Forecast — researches each question to predict outcomes.

tools.name: everyrow_progress
tools.description: Check progress of a running task.

tools.name: everyrow_results
tools.description: Retrieve results from a completed task.

tools.name: everyrow_list_sessions
tools.description: List everyrow sessions owned by the authenticated user (paginated).

tools.name: everyrow_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a running everyrow task. Use when the user wants to stop a task that is currently processing.

tools.name: everyrow_upload_data
tools.description: Upload data from a URL or local file. Returns an artifact_id for use in processing tools.

api_key.title: Everyrow API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from https://everyrow.io/api-key ($20 free credit)
